title: Use the Distributive Property
essential_question: How can you use the Distributive Property to solve multiplication problems?
strategies: Break the larger factor into tens: 6 × 30 = 6 × (10 + 10 + 10) = 60 + 60 + 60 = 180.
Always check your answer with basic facts.

learn.title: The Distributive Property
learn.content: You can break apart one factor to make multiplication easier. Example: 6 × 30 = 6 × (10 + 10 + 10) = 60 + 60 + 60 = 180. Breaking the factor into smaller parts gives the same product.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Using Place Value
learn.content: Think of 30 as 3 tens. So 6 × 30 = 6 × 3 tens = 18 tens = 180. The shortcut: multiply the one-digit factor by the non-zero digit, then attach a zero. 6 × 3 = 18 → 6 × 30 = 180.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Solving Word Problems
learn.content: Identify the two factors, then use place value. Example: 8 buses × 40 students = 8 × 4 tens = 32 tens = 320 students. Read the problem, write the equation, apply the strategy.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Break Into Any Two Parts
learn.content: You can split a factor into any two addends: 6 × 7 = 6 × (3 + 4) = 18 + 24 = 42. Or split a multiple of 10: 7 × 30 = 7 × (20 + 10) = 140 + 70 = 210. Any split works as long as the parts add up to the original factor.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Why It Always Works
learn.content: The rule is: a × (b + c) = (a × b) + (a × c). Example: 5 × (20 + 30) = (5 × 20) + (5 × 30) = 100 + 150 = 250. This is the same as 5 × 50 = 250. The Distributive Property always gives the same answer.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 한 자리 × 10의 배수 = 기본 사실 + 0 붙이기
learn.content: 3 × 40 같은 식의 핵심 직관: 40 = 4 × 10 이므로, 3 × 40 = 3 × (4 × 10) = (3 × 4) × 10 = 12 × 10 = 120. 단계 1: 기본 사실 계산 (3 × 4 = 12). 단계 2: 0을 한 개 붙이기 (12 → 120). 흔한 실수 1: M01 — 0 붙이기 잊음 (답을 12로). 흔한 실수 2: M02 — 0을 두 개 붙임 (답을 1200으로). 기억법: '인자에 0이 한 개 → 곱에도 0이 한 개'.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분배법칙으로 더 쪼개기 (어려운 곱셈 풀기)
learn.content: 큰 수의 곱셈도 분배로 작은 부분으로 나눌 수 있음. 예: 6 × 70 = 6 × (50 + 20) = (6 × 50) + (6 × 20) = 300 + 120 = 420. 예: 7 × 30 = 7 × (10 + 20) = 70 + 140 = 210. 단계 1: 10의 배수를 두 친한 부분으로 분해. 단계 2: 각 부분에 곱하기 (모두에). 단계 3: 두 결과 더하기. 흔한 실수 (M03): 한 부분만 곱하고 멈춤.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.3 'Use Distributive Property' pp.197-200
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 한 자리 × 10의 배수 — 풀이 4단계 + 검증
learn.content: 단계 1 식 인식: a × b0 형태? 또는 분배 필요? 단계 2 분리: 40 = 4 × 10 (덧셈 분리 ❌, 곱셈 분리 ✓). 단계 3 기본 사실 + 0 붙이기. 단계 4 결과 검증: 답이 a × b의 10배인지 확인. 🔍 분배 형태인 경우: 두 부분 모두에 곱했는지 확인 (M03 방지). 🔍 자릿수 검증: 한 자리 × 두 자리 = 일반적으로 두~세 자리 곱.

verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Distributive Property with Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

hints: Set up: 8 × n = 320. Think in tens: 8 × ? tens = 32 tens.
8 × 4 = 32, so 8 × 40 = 320. The answer is 40.

feedback.correct: Correct! 8 × 40 = 320, so each bus has 40 students.

try.question: 320 students travel in 8 buses. Each bus has the same number of students. How many students per bus?
try.feedback_correct: Correct! 8 × 40 = 320, so each bus has 40 students.
